title: M&E / Bio-containment Engineer
description:
World Health SafetyTec (WHST) is a Singapore-based company providing EHS Consultation, Biological Indicator (BI) sterility testing, bizSAFE 3 certification support, and outsourcing of Safety & Medical Personnel. 

We partner with clients and businesses to strengthen workplace safety, regulatory compliance, and operational excellence.

For this position, selected candidate will be stationed onsite with a client partner as part of our outsourced services. This dual-role position requires strong engineering knowledge across HVAC, BMS, critical containment systems and facility infrastructure along with a firm understanding of the operational needs of high-containment labs. The engineer will ensure optimal performance, reliability, compliance and readiness of all engineering systems that support both research safety and business continuity.

Key Responsibilities:

1. Biocontainment Engineering Oversight

i. Oversee engineering systems for the ABSL3 and BSL-2 labs, including:

a. HVAC systems from chiller performance to pressure cascades within the containment facilities.

b. Effluent Decontamination System (EDS)

c. Autoclaves, digesters, pass-through systems

d. Laboratory gas and water systems etc

ii. Ensure engineering compliance with:

a. Singapore MOH BATA, SS 636, WSH, BCA, SCDF regulations etc

iii. Collaborate with Biosafety Manager to ensure engineering controls meet

containment and safety requirements.

2. Maintenance and System Performance

i. Manage and supervise planned preventive maintenance, corrective

maintenance and performance testing for all M&E systems.

ii. Ensure integrity and continuity of critical systems (e.g, emergency power, chillers, fire suppression, building automation systems etc).

iii. Lead and support annual system validations (e.g., HEPA integrity testing, airflow performance, BMS re-calibration, EDS validation). This include

support engineering stress test during annual ABSL3 Facilities certification by MOH and certifier.

3. Facility Readiness and Troubleshooting

i. Serve as first responder for engineering issues affecting bio-containment systems or building infrastructure.

ii. Coordinate response to breakdowns or alarms and liaise with vendors, contractors, and internal stakeholders.

iii. Maintain 24/7 operational readiness of containment infrastructure.

4. Project Management and Commissioning

i. Support facility expansion, retrofitting or upgrading projects including:

a) Design input on biocontainment and M&E systems

b) Equipment installation, testing & commissioning

c) Engineering review of drawings and compliance documentation

ii. Participate in handover reviews, FAT/SAT, contractor evaluation etc.

5. Documentation and Compliance

i. Oversight to ensure accurate records of maintenance logs, system performance, engineering drawings and compliance certificates.

ii. Support documentation for regulatory inspections (e.g. MOH audits) and internal biosafety or facilities audits.

iii. Track utilities usage, asset lifecycle and energy performance indicators.

Qualification & Experinece Requirements:

1. Education & Experience:

i. Degree or Diploma in Mechanical, Electrical, Building Services Engineering or equivalent.

ii. Minimum 5 years of relevant experience in M&E operations; prior work in hospital, research, pharmaceutical or bio-containment facilities is highly desirable.

iii. Experience managing or operating in BSL-2, BSL-3 or ABSL3 facilities is a strong advantage.

2. Certifications (Preferred):

i. Licensed Electrical Worker (LEW) or Fire Safety Manager (FSM)

ii. Engineering for Biosafety or related course /training

3. Key Skills & Attributes:

i. Solid understanding of HVAC systems for containment environments.

ii. Familiarity with Building Management Systems (BMS), PLC/SCADA interfaces, and lab-specific M&E controls.

iii. iv. Good analytical, troubleshooting and documentation skills. Ability to work under pressure and respond to system emergencies quickly and effectively.

v. Team player with clear communication and cross-disciplinary coordination skills.

Please include your current and expected salary in your resume. Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. Thank you for your understanding.
